title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Ambrane

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Ambrane
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ambrane! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ambrane:
Ambrane is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambrane!
